Notes: NCAA North Central Regional championship game.
Winner advances to NCAA Div. II Elite Eight in Hot Spring, Ark.
All-tourney team: Nakia Carlisle and Jen Pozzani- CSP, Kristi Boese- UND,
Shannon Francis and Erika Quigley (MVP)- SCSU
Game.Location: Betty Engelstad SC, Grand Forks, N.D.
Game.Officials: Brian Ryken,  Mitch Parker,  Michaela Fox
